name: Medica
description: A battle-medic who combines surgical precision with healing arts. Moderate stats across the board; uniquely able to restore HP.

abilities.name: Surgical Strike
abilities.description: A precise attack targeting vital points.

abilities.name: Healing Touch
abilities.description: Channel healing energy to restore 25 HP.

abilities.name: Triage
abilities.description: Rapid field medicine: restore 12 HP instantly.
